sys_script_include.description:
Methods to provide permission checks for UI Actions related to Mark Inactive business rules. 2.7.1 | 2021-12-12 | raj | DFCT0010665 - "Re-open" modal displays when attempting to re-open the bottom task of a "Serial" task tree
2.7 STRY0074131 - Stretch- FIX: CDS – Activity Log entries display on the Activity Tab of the Top Task where multiple subtasks with multi-OUs and Members were created in Serial
2.5 P3 // STRY0084850 - duration was not passed correctly
sys_script_include.name: Task_onInsert_Multiple_Sub_Tasks
